prompt: Create an ultra-realistic candid editorial flash photograph of a young South Asian or Middle Eastern man in his early 20s with thick dark wavy hair, trimmed beard, medium olive skin, and a calm slightly serious expression standing close to the camera at a crowded apartment kitchen party. He is centered in a vertical 4:5 frame, leaning casually against a messy kitchen island with one hand braced on the counter and the other holding a brown beer bottle. Dress him in a vintage white long-sleeve Real Madrid football jersey with dark navy collar, Adidas stripes, club crest, and Teka sponsor logo, dark jeans, and a relaxed party posture. The scene contains exactly 11 visible background partygoers around him, softly blurred: a partial blonde person at far left, a woman in a white top holding a drink, a young man in a dark shirt holding a bottle, three dim figures near the blue-lit back room, a woman in profile near the kitchen counter, two women chatting in the mid-background, a woman in a white tank top holding a bottle, and a partial person in black at far right. Include exactly 7 visible beer bottles total: 1 in the subject’s hand, 2 held by people on the left, 1 held by the woman in the white tank top, and 3 on the cluttered counter. Add party clutter on the island: pizza boxes with leftover slices and crumbs, a blue plastic cup, a yellow chip bag, napkins, and scattered food scraps. Use warm tungsten kitchen lighting from pendant lamps and under-cabinet lights, with a cool blue glow from the back room, slight rainbow lens flares across the frame, realistic high-ISO grain, shallow depth of field, wide-angle close candid perspective, natural skin texture, imperfect messy environment, and an authentic late-night house-party mood. The camera should feel like a handheld editorial snapshot taken at eye level with a 28mm lens, subject sharply focused, background softly motion-blurred, no posing, no studio lighting, no watermark.
